title: Watch Flock Safety CEO Garrett Langley discuss the future of surveillance at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
summary: Flock’s business success has been paired with pushback from privacy advocates like the ACLU and members of the general public, with some people going so far as destroying Flock’s surveillance cameras as it continues to offer its cameras and databases to U.S.
